text: {"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"1","subject":"Analyze current architecture and identify technical debt","description":"Deep-dive into the existing Bitazza iOS codebase. Analyze: module structure (BitazzaAppV2, Core, CoreService, CoreUI), dependency graph, Data/Domain/Features layering, DI approach (Swinject), navigation patterns, networking (Alamofire+WebSocket), third-party SDK coupling. Identify technical debt: tight coupling, god objects, missing abstractions, test coverage gaps, duplicated code, layer violations. Produce a prioritized debt inventory.","assignedBy":"analyst","timestamp":"2026-03-10T05:06:40.861Z"}
